tip: Water your plants when the top inch of soil feels dry. Avoid overwatering.
Place low-light plants away from direct sun, and bright plants near windows.
Feed plants with a balanced liquid fertilizer once a month during growing season.
Trim yellow or dead leaves regularly to promote healthy new growth.
Increase humidity with a mist spray or by placing a tray of water near your plants.
Repot plants once a year to refresh soil and give roots more space to grow.
